name: Arizer Go SRT
summary: A compact convection portable with adjustable session intensity for patients who want strong, flavourful vapour on the go.
description: The Arizer Go SRT is a portable convection vaporiser with rapid heat-up and Arizer's V-Scale system, which lets you dial session intensity from light, flavour-led draws up to dense vapour. The glass vapour path keeps flavour pure, and a simple three-button interface with a vertical display makes one-handed use easy. A 14mm water pipe adapter is included for cooler draws through glass. It suits patients who want adjustable strength and convection performance in a pocketable, durable aluminium body. The heating element carries a lifetime warranty.
